item.title: Eiger in the the Bernese Alps
item.description: The Eiger is a 3,967-metre mountain of the Bernese Alps, overlooking Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen in the Bernese Oberland of Switzerland, just north of the main watershed and border with Valais. ## Visiting an Alphorn manufacture Alphorns are traditional Swiss folkmusic instrument
